differential_diagnoses: Sepsis-associated acute kidney injury with rhabdomyolysis
Dermatomyositis/Antisynthetase syndrome presenting with ILD and myositis
next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for respiratory cultures, PCR panels (including Legionella), and cytology
Start empiric treatment for Legionella (e.g., levofloxacin or azithromycin)
Continue aggressive intravenous fluid resuscitation and manage electrolyte abnormalities
Consult nephrology for potential emergent hemodialysis given severe AKI and metabolic derangements
Perform neurological evaluation including lumbar puncture if mental status does not improve with metabolic correction
Consider muscle biopsy if myopathy persists or autoimmune markers (e.g., CK-MB, aldolase, ANA, myositis panel) are positive
